movie.title: Magnificent Obsession
movie.tagline: This was the moment unashamed... when this man and this woman felt the first ecstasy of their Magnificent Obsession
movie.overview: Reckless playboy Bob Merrick crashes his speedboat, requiring emergency attention from the town’s only resuscitator while a local hero, Dr. Phillips, dies waiting for the life-saving device. Merrick then tries to right his wrongs with the doctor’s widow, Helen, falling in love with her in the process.
